action_choice_hints: Whether the action cell is in the same row or column as a special target token
If the action cell is the nearest unblocked cell to a control token along a cardinal direction
Whether there exists a contiguous run of empty cells between the action cell and a boundary or obstacle
If the action cell is adjacent to a moving token or agent
Whether the action cell is within K steps of a target token, unobstructed
If the action cell is the first empty cell encountered along a direction from a control token
Whether the action cell is part of a contiguous segment of empty cells of length at least N
If the action cell is blocked by an obstacle before reaching a target token along a direction
Whether the action cell is in a region (e.g., top/bottom band) containing a specific role token
If all cells between the action cell and a control token are empty
Whether the action cell is at the boundary of the grid
If the action cell is the only available cell in a row or column not blocked by obstacles
Whether the action cell is aligned with a drawn trace or path
If the action cell is the closest to a target token among all candidates
Whether the action cell is surrounded by empty cells on at least three sides
transition_hints: Selecting a cell containing an empty token converts it to a drawn trace
When a control token is adjacent to a selected cell, the control token advances into that cell
Obstacles remain static and do not change during transitions
Selecting a cell aligned with a target token may trigger a state change in the target
Drawn traces persist and accumulate with each action
Agent tokens move deterministically toward the selected cell if unobstructed
If a path is blocked by an obstacle, no movement occurs along that direction
Selecting a cell at the boundary does not affect out-of-bounds areas
Contiguous runs of drawn traces are extended by each action
Selecting a cell adjacent to a moving token causes the moving token to update its position
feature_family_hints: Directional scan features to detect the nearest special token along rows or columns
Relative position features between candidate cell and control or target tokens
Contiguity features to measure length of empty or drawn segments
Obstacle detection features to determine if a path is blocked
Adjacency features for neighboring roles (e.g., agent, moving token, obstacle)
Boundary proximity features to check if a cell is at or near the grid edge
Global count features for the number of special tokens present
Region-based features to identify presence of roles in specific grid bands
Path extension features to detect if a drawn trace can be continued
First-encounter features for the first empty or special cell along a direction
Support features to check if a cell is supported by a contiguous structure below or beside
Isolation features to detect if a cell is surrounded by empty or obstacle cells
Alignment features to check if a cell is aligned with existing traces or targets
Unobstructed path features to verify clear lines between roles
Uniqueness features to determine if a candidate cell is the only valid option in a region

diversity_requirements: Include both local (adjacency) and global (region-based) predicate templates
Require at least one template that combines directionality with contiguity
placeholder_usage_limits: Limit templates to at most two free coordinate placeholders per feature
Restrict directional scans to a maximum of three steps from the candidate cell
avoidances: Avoid templates that only check for the presence of a single token role at a fixed location
Do not allow templates that duplicate the same predicate with only minor coordinate shifts
